title: The West forgot how to make things, now it’s forgetting how to code
summary:
The article argues that the West, having forgotten how to manufacture essential goods, is now repeating this mistake by neglecting the development of skilled software engineers due to an over-reliance on AI.

The author illustrates this through the defense industry's struggles. Restarting Stinger missile production after decades required bringing back retired engineers to teach younger workers, revealing lost knowledge and obsolete equipment. Similarly, Europe failed to meet its promise of one million artillery shells due to fragmented production, closed plants, and a lack of domestic propellant, highlighting an industry optimized for small batches, not volume or crisis. The "Fogbank" incident, where crucial nuclear material couldn't be reproduced because its production knowledge, including a critical undocumented impurity, had retired with the original workers, serves as a stark warning.

This pattern—building capability, finding a cheaper substitute (like the "peace dividend"), allowing human expertise to atrophy, and then facing collapse in a crisis—is now unfolding in the software industry with AI. While AI generates code rapidly, human review becomes a bottleneck, and the author notes declining university enrollment and reduced junior engineer hiring, with many developers becoming reliant on "AI-mediated competence" rather than deep understanding.

Developing a competent senior engineer takes 5-10 years, a timeline that cannot be compressed by money or AI. The author warns that the tacit knowledge gained from formative mistakes and hands-on experience is being lost. As current senior engineers retire, the critical institutional knowledge needed for end-to-end system understanding and complex debugging will disappear, creating a "Fogbank for code." The West's bet on AI optimization, much like its earlier bet on perpetual peace, risks a future crisis of lost software capability.
chinese_title: 西方忘记了如何制造东西，现在它正在忘记如何编程。
chinese_summary:
文章认为，西方在忘记如何制造必需品之后，如今正因过度依赖人工智能而忽视熟练软件工程师的培养，重蹈覆辙。

作者通过国防工业的困境阐明了这一点。在数十年后重启“毒刺”导弹生产，需要请回退休工程师来教导年轻工人，这暴露了知识流失和设备过时的问题。同样，欧洲未能兑现其生产一百万枚炮弹的承诺，原因在于生产碎片化、工厂关闭以及国内推进剂短缺，这凸显了一个为小批量而非大规模或危机生产优化的行业。“雾堤”（Fogbank）事件——其中关键核材料无法复制，因为其生产知识（包括一种关键的未记录的杂质）已随着最初的工人退休而消失——敲响了严峻的警钟。

这种模式——即建立能力、寻找更廉价的替代品（如“和平红利”）、任由人类专业知识萎缩，然后在危机中面临崩溃——现在正随着人工智能的出现，在软件行业中上演。尽管人工智能能快速生成代码，但人工审查却成了瓶颈；作者指出，大学入学人数下降，初级工程师招聘减少，许多开发者开始依赖“AI中介能力”，而非深入理解。

培养一名合格的资深工程师需要5-10年，这是一个无法通过金钱或人工智能来缩短的时间线。作者警告说，从形成性错误和实践经验中获得的默会知识正在流失。随着当前资深工程师的退休，端到端系统理解和复杂调试所需的关键机构知识将会消失，从而形成一个“代码的雾堤”。西方对人工智能优化的押注，就像其早前对永久和平的押注一样，可能会导致未来软件能力丧失的危机。

title: Amateur armed with ChatGPT solves an Erdős problem
summary:
On April 24, 2026, Liam Price, a 23-year-old amateur with no advanced mathematics training, solved a 60-year-old Erdős problem using a single prompt to ChatGPT Pro (GPT-5.4 Pro). The problem concerned "primitive sets" of whole numbers, where no number in the set can be evenly divided by another, and the "Erdős sum" associated with them. This particular conjecture had stumped prominent mathematicians for decades.

Experts like UCLA's Terence Tao and Stanford's Jared Lichtman confirmed the solution's validity and, critically, its novelty. Unlike previous human attempts that consistently took an initial wrong turn, ChatGPT employed an entirely new method. It applied a well-known mathematical formula from a different domain that no human had considered relevant to this specific problem type.

While the AI's raw proof was initially "quite poor" and required expert distillation by Lichtman and Tao, its core insight—a "cognitive leap"—is considered groundbreaking. This achievement suggests AI can discover truly original mathematical approaches, not merely replicate human thinking. Experts believe this "new way to think about large numbers and their anatomy" may have broader applications, validating prior intuitions about unifying themes in these complex problems and signaling a new frontier for AI in pure mathematics.
chinese_title: ChatGPT助力业余者解决厄尔多斯问题
chinese_summary:
2026年4月24日，23岁的业余爱好者利亚姆·普莱斯在没有受过高等数学训练的情况下，仅通过一次对ChatGPT Pro（GPT-5.4 Pro）的提示，解决了困扰数学界长达60年的埃尔德什问题。这个问题涉及整数的“本原集”（其中集合中任何一个数都不能被另一个数整除）以及与它们相关的“埃尔德什和”。这一特定的猜想几十年来一直困扰着著名的数学家。

洛杉矶加州大学的陶哲轩和斯坦福大学的贾里德·利希特曼等专家证实了该解决方案的有效性，更重要的是，证实了其新颖性。与之前人类尝试总是走错第一步不同，ChatGPT采用了一种全新的方法。它应用了一个来自不同领域的众所周知的数学公式，而没有任何人类曾认为与这类特定问题相关。

尽管人工智能的原始证明最初“相当糟糕”，并需要利希特曼和陶哲轩进行专家提炼，但其核心洞察力——一次“认知飞跃”——被认为是开创性的。这一成就表明，人工智能可以发现真正原创的数学方法，而不仅仅是复制人类的思维。专家们认为，这种“思考大数及其结构的新方式”可能具有更广泛的应用，证实了先前关于这些复杂问题中统一主题的直觉，并预示着人工智能在纯数学领域的一个新前沿。

title: New 10 GbE USB adapters are cooler, smaller, cheaper
summary:
New RTL8159-based 10 GbE USB 3.2 adapters are emerging as a smaller, cooler, and cheaper alternative to traditional Thunderbolt 10 GbE adapters. For instance, the WisdPi 10G adapter costs $80, less than half the price of Thunderbolt models, and runs significantly cooler (42.5°C) without requiring large heatsinks.

However, achieving the full 10 Gbps speed is a major caveat. Testing revealed that only a desktop PC with a USB 3.2 Gen 2x2 (20 Gbps) port consistently hit near 10 Gbps. Other systems like Macs and a Framework 13 with USB 3.1/3.2 Gen 2 (10 Gbps) ports only reached 6-7 Gbps, highlighting the impact of host USB bandwidth. The convoluted USB naming conventions and Windows' tendency to misreport USB 3.x connections as "3.0" further complicate identifying compatible ports.

While Macs offered plug-and-play functionality, Windows required driver installation. Bidirectional testing showed varied performance, with Macs handling traffic symmetrically, but other systems displaying disparities.

Ultimately, these adapters offer a good value if you have a 10 Gbps RJ45 network and a computer equipped with a USB 3.2 Gen 2x2 port. Without the high-bandwidth USB port, 2.5 Gbps or 5 Gbps USB adapters provide better value for their performance. For guaranteed full 10 Gbps or SFP+ support, Thunderbolt adapters remain the superior, albeit more expensive, choice.
chinese_title: 新万兆USB网卡：更低温、更小、更便宜
chinese_summary:
基于RTL8159芯片的新型10千兆以太网USB 3.2适配器正在兴起，成为相比传统雷电10千兆以太网适配器更小巧、更凉爽、更便宜的替代品。例如，WisdPi 10G适配器售价80美元，不及雷电型号价格的一半，并且运行温度显著更低（42.5°C），无需大型散热片。

然而，实现完整的10 Gbps速度是一个重要的注意事项。测试表明，只有配备USB 3.2 Gen 2x2（20 Gbps）端口的台式PC才能稳定达到接近10 Gbps的速度。其他系统，如Mac电脑和配备USB 3.1/3.2 Gen 2（10 Gbps）端口的Framework 13笔记本，仅达到6-7 Gbps，凸显了主机USB带宽的影响。复杂的USB命名规范以及Windows系统将USB 3.x连接错误报告为“3.0”的倾向，进一步增加了识别兼容端口的难度。

尽管Mac电脑支持即插即用，Windows系统则需要安装驱动程序。双向测试显示性能各异，Mac电脑能对称处理数据流量，但其他系统则表现出差异。

总的来说，如果你有一个10 Gbps的RJ45网络，并且电脑配备了USB 3.2 Gen 2x2端口，这些适配器物有所值。如果没有高带宽的USB端口，2.5 Gbps或5 Gbps的USB适配器在性能方面提供更好的价值。对于保证实现完整的10 Gbps速度或SFP+支持，雷电适配器仍然是更优越的选择，尽管价格更高。

title: Asahi Linux Progress Linux 7.0
summary:
Asahi Linux has released a comprehensive progress report coinciding with Linux 7.0, detailing significant advancements across several fronts.

The Asahi Installer, updated to version 0.8.0 after two years, now features automated build processes via GitHub workflows. This resolves previous issues where outdated Devicetrees made newer kernels incompatible with UEFI-only installs. The new installer also includes Mac Pro support and a streamlined firmware update mode, essential for future upgrades.

Support for Apple's True Tone (Ambient Light Sensor - ALS) has been enabled through the Always-On Processor (AOP). Crucially, the installer can now automatically retrieve and update necessary calibration firmware from macOS, simplifying future firmware management and avoiding manual EFI partition surgery.

Power efficiency has seen major improvements, with new drivers for the Power Management Processor (PMP) reducing idle power consumption by approximately 20% (0.5W) on devices like the 14" M1 Pro MacBook Pro. Work is ongoing to extend PMP support to base M1 SoCs.

Bluetooth audio dropouts are now largely eliminated thanks to new kernel support for Broadcom's vendor-specific Host Controller Interface (HCI) extensions, which manage Wi-Fi and Bluetooth coexistence more effectively, prioritizing audio streams.

Finally, developers uncovered Variable Refresh Rate (VRR) functionality for both external and internal ProMotion displays. While the display controller's requirement for a modeset to transition VRR states prevents its full, standard exposure to userspace and compositors, users can force it on with a kernel module parameter. This limitation is being investigated, particularly for HDMI connections where such transitions are permitted.
chinese_title: 朝日 Linux 进展 Linux 7.0
chinese_summary:
Asahi Linux 在适逢 Linux 7.0 发布之际，发布了一份全面的进展报告，详细介绍了在多个方面取得的重大进展。

沉寂两年后更新至 0.8.0 版本的 Asahi 安装器，现在通过 GitHub 工作流实现了自动化构建过程。这解决了此前因设备树（Devicetrees）过时，导致较新内核无法与纯 UEFI 安装兼容的问题。新的安装器还包括对 Mac Pro 的支持，以及一个精简的固件更新模式，这对未来的升级至关重要。

苹果的 True Tone（环境光传感器 - ALS）支持已通过始终在线处理器（AOP）实现。至关重要的是，安装器现在可以自动从 macOS 中获取并更新必要的校准固件，从而简化了未来的固件管理，并避免了手动修改 EFI 分区。

功耗效率方面取得了重大改进，针对电源管理处理器（PMP）的新驱动，将14英寸M1 Pro MacBook Pro等设备的空闲功耗降低了约20%（0.5W）。将PMP支持扩展到基础M1 SoC的工作正在进行中。

得益于内核对博通（Broadcom）厂商专用主机控制器接口（HCI）扩展的新支持，蓝牙音频中断现已基本消除。这些扩展能更有效地管理 Wi-Fi 和蓝牙共存，优先处理音频流。

最后，开发者发现了适用于外部和内部 ProMotion 显示器的可变刷新率（VRR）功能。尽管显示控制器要求进行模式切换（modeset）才能转换 VRR 状态，这阻止了其完全、标准地暴露给用户空间和合成器，但用户可以通过内核模块参数强制启用它。这一限制正在调查中，特别是在允许此类转换的 HDMI 连接上。

title: Trump fires NSF's oversight board
summary:
In an unprecedented move, the Trump administration fired all 24 members of the National Science Board (NSB) in mid-November 2020. The NSB serves as the governing body for the National Science Foundation (NSF), setting its policies, approving major research initiatives, and advising the President and Congress on science and engineering matters.

Members of the bipartisan board, who typically serve staggered six-year terms, received letters stating their removal was "at the pleasure of the President." This mass firing, occurring during the lame-duck period after President Trump had lost the election, drew strong condemnation from the science community. Critics viewed it as a politically motivated action that undermines the NSB's non-partisan independence and risks politicizing scientific oversight. Concerns were raised about the disruption to the NSF's critical functions and the precedent set for future administrations. The incoming Biden administration faced the immediate task of appointing an entirely new board.
chinese_title: 特朗普解散国家科学基金会监督委员会
chinese_summary:
2020年11月中旬，特朗普政府史无前例地解雇了国家科学委员会（NSB）的全部24名成员。国家科学委员会（NSB）是国家科学基金会（NSF）的管理机构，负责制定其政策，批准重大研究计划，并就科学和工程事务向总统和国会提供建议。

这个由两党组成的委员会的成员通常任期为交错的六年，他们接到的信函称，他们的解职是“由总统酌情决定”。这次大规模解雇发生在特朗普总统输掉大选后的跛脚鸭时期，招致了科学界的强烈谴责。批评者认为这是一次出于政治动机的行动，破坏了国家科学委员会（NSB）的无党派独立性，并有可能使科学监督政治化。人们对国家科学基金会（NSF）关键职能的中断以及为未来政府设定的先例表示担忧。即将上任的拜登政府面临着立即任命一个全新委员会的任务。

title: USB Cheat Sheet (2022)
summary:
This USB Cheat Sheet clarifies the often-confusing terminology and specifications of Universal Serial Bus standards, stemming from the author's personal experience with misunderstood terms.

The document traces the evolution of USB, detailing "Marketing Names" alongside their "Also Known As" designations. It shows the progression from USB 1.1 (Full Speed, 12 Mbps) and USB 2.0 (Hi-Speed, 480 Mbps) to the significantly faster SuperSpeed USB variants. For instance, "SuperSpeed USB 5Gbps" encompasses USB 3.0, USB 3.1 Gen 1, and USB 3.2 Gen 1, all operating at 5000 Mbps (625 MiB/s). Subsequent versions, such as "SuperSpeedPlus USB 10Gbps" (USB 3.1/3.2 Gen 2) and "SuperSpeedPlus USB 20Gbps" (USB 3.2 Gen 2x2), double and quadruple these speeds, respectively, culminating in USB4 40Gbps.

The "Gen naming Convention" (USB Gen A x B) explains that 'A' refers to the generation and 'B' to the number of lanes used. Multi-lane systems, like Gen 2x2, bond multiple lanes to achieve higher total signal speeds, though real-life transfer rates are reduced by encoding overhead (e.g., 8b/10b or 128b/132b).

Cable wire counts increased with speed: 4 wires for USB 1.1/2.0, 8 for early SuperSpeed, and 12 for the highest speeds (20Gbps and 40Gbps), supporting multiple data lanes. Only the USB Type-C connector features enough pins (12 wires) to support dual lanes, power negotiation (CC1/CC2), and Alt Modes.

Charging capabilities have also drastically improved, from USB 2.0's 2.5W to USB 3.0/3.1's 4.5W. With USB-C and Power Delivery (PD), power output soared from 15W (non-PD) to 100W (PD 1/2) and up to 240W with PD 3.1 Extended Power Range (EPR). The cheat sheet concludes with a timeline of USB specification releases from 1996 to 2019.
chinese_title: USB 速查表 (2022)
chinese_summary:
这份USB速查表旨在澄清通用串行总线标准中那些常常令人困惑的术语和规范，这些困惑源于作者个人对误解术语的经历。

该文档追溯了USB的演进，详细说明了“营销名称”及其“也称为”的命名。它展示了从USB 1.1（全速，12 Mbps）和USB 2.0（高速，480 Mbps）到显著更快的SuperSpeed USB变体的进展。例如，“SuperSpeed USB 5Gbps”涵盖了USB 3.0、USB 3.1 Gen 1和USB 3.2 Gen 1，它们都以5000 Mbps（625 MiB/s）运行。随后的版本，如“SuperSpeedPlus USB 10Gbps”（USB 3.1/3.2 Gen 2）和“SuperSpeedPlus USB 20Gbps”（USB 3.2 Gen 2x2），分别将这些速度提高了一倍和四倍，最终达到USB4 40Gbps。

“Gen命名约定”（USB Gen A x B）解释了“A”指代代数，“B”指代所使用的通道数。多通道系统，如Gen 2x2，通过绑定多个通道以实现更高的总信号速度，尽管实际传输速率会因编码开销（例如，8b/10b或128b/132b）而降低。

线缆的线芯数量随着速度的增加而增加：USB 1.1/2.0为4根线，早期SuperSpeed为8根，最高速度（20Gbps和40Gbps）为12根，以支持多数据通道。只有USB Type-C连接器具有足够的引脚（12根线）来支持双通道、电源协商（CC1/CC2）和替代模式。

充电能力也得到了大幅提升，从USB 2.0的2.5W到USB 3.0/3.1的4.5W。借助USB-C和供电（PD）技术，功率输出从15W（非PD）飙升至100W（PD 1/2），使用PD 3.1扩展功率范围（EPR）时最高可达240W。该速查表最后附有1996年至2019年USB规范发布的时间线。

title: Firefox Has Integrated Brave's Adblock Engine
summary:
Firefox 149, released in March, quietly integrated `adblock-rust`, Brave's open-source, Rust-based ad and tracker blocking engine. This significant addition went largely unnoticed until Shivan Kaul Sahib, Brave's VP of Privacy and Security, highlighted it in a blog post, as it was not included in the release notes.

The `adblock-rust` engine, licensed under MPL-2.0, powers Brave's native content blocker. It is designed for network request blocking, cosmetic filtering, and supports a uBlock Origin-compatible filter list syntax. The integration landed via Bugzilla Bug 2013888, titled "Add a prototype rich content blocking engine," and is disabled by default, lacking a user interface or pre-included filter lists. Waterfox, a popular Firefox fork, has also adopted this engine, building on Firefox's implementation.

To test this experimental feature, users are advised to use a throwaway Firefox installation. First, disable Enhanced Tracking Protection for the test website. Then, in `about:config`, set `privacy.trackingprotection.content.protection.enabled` to "true". Next, edit `privacy.trackingprotection.content.protection.test_list_urls` to add filter lists like `https://easylist.to/easylist/easylist.txt|https://easylist.to/easylist/easyprivacy.txt`. Upon visiting a site with ads, the engine should block the ad content, though ad slots might still render.
chinese_title: 火狐集成 Brave 广告拦截引擎
chinese_summary:
Firefox 149 于三月发布，悄然集成了 `adblock-rust`，这是 Brave 开源的、基于 Rust 的广告和追踪器拦截引擎。这一重要新增功能在很大程度上未被察觉，直到 Brave 的隐私与安全副总裁 Shivan Kaul Sahib 在一篇博客文章中强调了它，因为它并未被包含在发布说明中。

`adblock-rust` 引擎采用 MPL-2.0 许可证，为 Brave 的原生内容拦截器提供支持。它专为网络请求拦截和美化过滤而设计，并支持与 uBlock Origin 兼容的过滤列表语法。此次集成通过 Bugzilla Bug 2013888 实现，该 Bug 题为“添加一个原型富内容拦截引擎”，并且默认禁用，没有用户界面或预设的过滤列表。Waterfox，一个流行的 Firefox 分支，也采用了此引擎，其实现方式基于 Firefox 的集成。

要测试此实验性功能，建议用户使用一个临时 Firefox 安装。首先，禁用测试网站的增强型追踪保护。接着，在 `about:config` 中，将 `privacy.trackingprotection.content.protection.enabled` 设置为“true”。接下来，编辑 `privacy.trackingprotection.content.protection.test_list_urls` 以添加过滤列表，例如 `https://easylist.to/easylist/easylist.txt|https://easylist.to/easylist/easyprivacy.txt`。访问包含广告的网站时，该引擎应该会拦截广告内容，尽管广告位可能仍会显示。
